keyEvents.text: Goal! Norway 1, England 0. Andreas Schjelderup (Norway) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard.
Goal! Norway 1, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Anthony Gordon.
Substitution, England. Bukayo Saka replaces Noni Madueke.
Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Declan Rice.
Substitution, Norway. Fredrik Aursnes replaces Julian Ryerson because of an injury.
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.
Substitution, Norway. Antonio Nusa replaces Andreas Schjelderup.
Substitution, England. Reece James replaces Anthony Gordon.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Nico O'Reilly.
Substitution, England. Morgan Rogers replaces Ezri Konsa.
Substitution, Norway. Marcus Pedersen replaces David Møller Wolfe.
Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces Torbjørn Heggem because of an injury.
